item.title: Building with Agents
item.description: 🛠 Building with Agents Short pitches on projects I build with AI agents — each framed by how Claude was used (coder, orchestrator, data-cruncher, in-the-loop operator), not just what got built.

item.title: AI-BT-Gym
item.description: Abstract An evolutionary “gym” in Godot (C#) where LLM-written behavior trees fight in a 2D chain-fist game and improve across generations.

item.title: DemonBluffAi-Redux
item.description: Abstract A web-based course that teaches modern computer-vision practice by building one constrained system end to end: reading Demon Bluff game state from video frames alone and serving it over a REST API.

item.title: OstranautDataExplorer
item.description: Abstract An IDE-style “Find Usages” browser for the game Ostranauts’ data tree, where everything is a CondOwner referencing other objects by string name across ~70 folders with no foreign keys or tooling.

item.title: ProductivityAndReadingHelper
item.description: Abstract A local, no-cloud toolkit for studying dense academic papers: PDF → markdown working copy → skim-highlight overlay + two-voice podcast script → synthesized audio.

item.title: SoundingChamber
item.description: Abstract A puzzle game about prophecy lawyering via historical sound change — prophecies bind to sounds, so you apply real linguistic rules (e → i / _r) to drift a whole language until bear becomes beer.

item.title: ai-verbal-coaching
item.description: Abstract “Voice Coach” is a local, on-device tool for rehearsing PhD interview answers out loud.

item.title: Panda's Portfolio
item.description: 🛠 Building with Agents Short pitches on how I build software with AI agents — framed by how Claude was actually used.

item.title: AR Minimap
item.description: Language: Unity3D using C# Goal: Allow second user to see the minimap using a AR phone.

item.title: Color Space
item.description: Core Skills: Python C_sharp notebooks unity Abstract Inspired by a post showing the different between a sRGB lerp vs HSV lerp.
